text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna drop by with your birthday present
later, so sit tight in your room, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Loud and clear, Hishiama. You're still as
forthcoming as ever, I see.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
One of these years, I wouldn't mind a surprise
present with no name on it, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Because even without a lead to go on, I'm sure
I'll still know that it came from you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that sounds like a pain, so I think I'll pass.
Not like I'm gettin' you presents for the sake of
the present anyway.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm only givin' you presents 'cause I wanna see you
smile.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So lemme give it to you in person. This is my one
day in the whole year where I can see your cute,
innocent smile.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Oh my, I wasn't expecting such a passionate
answer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you win this time, Hishiama. I'll be good
and head back to my room for now.
